title: gitgap: Knowledge Gap Observatory and Appreciated Gateway Methodology
description: Research-gap detection pipeline that surfaces explicitly declared gaps from peer-reviewed literature (PMC). Implements the Appreciated Gateway methodology and the NAUGHT → CAUGHT → FOUND classification used to identify high-impact, publishable gaps in active research. FastAPI service with knowledge-gap visualization (globe view), structural-hole analysis, and rejected-trail audit. Live deployment at gitgap.org.
